title: The Bouncy Path
premise_summary: A path that won’t stop bouncing
cover_description: Sunny clings to a tree branch, legs dangling, while the entire path below bounces wildly like a trampoline.
host_intro: Tonight, Sunny tries to walk to the park. The path has other plans.
host_outro: Sunny is now best friends with a very bouncy tree.
script:
[TITLE: The Bouncy Path]
[HOST_INTRO: Tonight, Sunny tries to walk to the park. The path has other plans.]
[HOST_OUTRO: Sunny is now best friends with a very bouncy tree.]
[AGE: 6-8]
[VOICES: young_sweet]
[COMEDY_TYPE: physical_escalation]

[SETUP]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: curious, tentative] Okay, so I’m walking to the park, right? [STING: tiptoe]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: deadpan] The path looks normal. Just a bunch of big green lumps lying across it.
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: unbothered] I step on the first lump. It’s squishy. Weird, but whatever.

[BEAT_1]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: suspicious] Oh. It’s not just squishy. It’s *bouncy*. [STING: boing]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] I bounced right over the next lump. Landed on the third one.
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: defensive] Okay, fine, maybe I should walk around them.

[BEAT_2]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: scrambling] Wait, why is the *grass* bouncing now? [STING: boing]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: panicked] I’m bouncing higher than the bushes! And the bushes are bouncing too!
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: desperate] I just bounced over a bench. A *bench*!

[BEAT_3]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: stunned, quiet] I think I broke the sky. [STING: big_crash]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: deadpan] No, wait. That’s just me stuck in a tree. A *very* bouncy tree.

[BUTTON]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: loud, triumphant] [PUNCHLINE]I’m not walking home. I’m just gonna live up here now.[/PUNCHLINE] [STING: slide_whistle]
[SUNNY] [DELIVERY: unbothered] The squirrels seem nice.

[COVER: Sunny clings to a tree branch, legs dangling, while the entire path below bounces wildly like a trampoline.]
[PREMISE: A path that won’t stop bouncing]
